build.stdout:
rm -rf main main.o

nvcc  -std=c++17 -Xcompiler -Wall -arch=sm_89 -O3 -c main.cu -o main.o
nvcc  -std=c++17 -Xcompiler -Wall -arch=sm_89 -O3 main.o -o main

correctness.stdout:
FEYNMAN_KAC_2D:

  Program parameters:

  The calculation takes place inside a 2D ellipse.
  A rectangular grid of points will be defined.
  The solution will be estimated for those grid points
  that lie inside the ellipse.

  Each solution will be estimated by computing 1000 trajectories
  from the point to the boundary.

    (X/A)^2 + (Y/B)^2 = 1

  The ellipse parameters A, B are set to:

    A = 2.000000
    B = 1.000000
  Stepsize H = 0.0010

  X coordinate marked by 255 points
  Y coordinate marked by 128 points
Average kernel time: 194.969857 (s)

  RMS absolute error in solution = 2.271622e-02

FEYNMAN_KAC_2D:
  Normal end of execution.

verification.details: Pattern 'RMS absolute error in solution' matched. Reports RMS absolute error; small values indicate convergence to analytical solution
